zh.lifeSummary: 當Margarethe de Lorraine於1269年出生在瑞士聖 加倫聖 加倫時，她的父親Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen31歲，母親Duchess Margaret de Champagne29歲。她於大約1285年與Graf Eberhard von Württemberg I結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1294年享年26歲，埋葬在德國爾特波格斯圖特加特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margarethe de Lorraine于1269年出生在瑞士聖 加倫聖 加倫时，她的父亲Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen31岁，母亲Duchess Margaret de Champagne29岁。她于大约1285年与Graf Eberhard von Württemberg I结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1294年享年26岁，埋葬在德国爾特波格斯圖特加特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lorraine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Perrine, Pierre.

French and English: habitational name from Lorraine, a region in the northeastern part of France. Its name derives from the name of the medieval kingdom of Lotharingia, which in turn was named for its sovereign Lothar (a personal name composed of the elements hlūd ‘famous, renowned’ + hari, heri ‘army’).
Altered form of French   Lorrain  , a variant of 1 above.

variants.name: Loring
meanings: English: ethnic name from Old French Lohereng ‘man fromLorraine’ (see Lorraine ).

variants.name: Lorrain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Alban, Andre, Desire, Fernande, Philippe, Pierre.
French: variant of   Lorraine  . This surname is also found in Britain. Compare   Laurain   and   Laurin  .
History: Pierre Lorrain dit Lachapelle from Angliers in Vienne, France, married Françoise Hulin in France c. 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Margarethe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretha
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.description: Three valleys in Central Switzerland unite against the counts of Habsburg and fight for autonomy. Cities join the confederacy. They conquer territories in northern and southern Switzerland.

en.lifeSummary: When Margarethe de Lorraine was born in 1269, in St. Gallen, Sankt Gallen, Switzerland, her father, Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen, was 31 and her mother, Duchess Margaret de Champagne, was 29. She married Graf Eberhard von Württemberg I about 1285. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died about 1294, at the age of 26, and was buried in Stuttgart, Württemberg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margarethe de Lorraine est née en 1269, à St. Gallen, St-Gall, Suisse, son père, Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Duchess Margaret de Champagne, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Graf Eberhard von Württemberg I environ 1285. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1294, à l’âge de 26 ans, et a été enterrée à Stuttgart, Württemberg, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margarethe de Lorraine 1269 in St. Gallen, St. Gallen, Schweiz geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen 31 und ihre Mutter Duchess Margaret de Champagne 29. Sie hat um 1285 Graf Eberhard von Württemberg I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1294 im Alter von 26 Jahren und wurde in Stuttgart, Württemberg, Deutschland begraben.

Herzog von Oberlothringen, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Duchess Margaret de Champagne, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Graf Eberhard von Württemberg I circa 1285. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1294, all'età di 26 anni, e fu sepolta a Stuttgart, Württemberg, Germania.

ko.lifeSummary: Margarethe de Lorraine(이)가 1269년 스위스 스트. 갈렌 스트. 갈렌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Duchess Margaret de Champagne(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1285년 Graf Eberhard von Württemberg I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1294년 26세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 wu르테버그 스투트가트에 묻혔다.

Herzog von Oberlothringen, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Duchess Margaret de Champagne, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Graf Eberhard von Württemberg I aproximadamente 1285. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1294, com 26 anos, e foi sepultada em Stuttgart, Württemberg, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margarethe de Lorraine родилась в 1269 г. в местности ст. галлен, ст. галлен, Швейцария, её отцу по имени Friedrich III. Herzog von Oberlothringen было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Duchess Margaret de Champagne, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Graf Eberhard von Württemberg I около 1285 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1294 г. в возрасте 26 лет и была похоронена в местности стуттгарт, вuрттембирг, Германия.
